data.title: ReGen III Nears $4 Million Target With Second Tranche of Private Placement
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from ReGen III Corp ( (TSE:GIII) ).

ReGen III Corp., a Vancouver-based clean technology firm focused on converting used motor oil into high-value Group III base oils, is positioning itself as a major producer of sustainable, re-refined lubricants for automotive, industrial and data center applications. The company targets the intersection of the energy transition and data-driven economy by supplying circular, domestically sourced base oils with materially lower emissions than crude-derived alternatives.

The company has closed the second tranche of its non-brokered private placement, raising $1.53 million through the issuance of 7,650,000 units at $0.20 each, bringing total proceeds so far to about $3.44 million. ReGen III plans a third and final tranche to reach roughly $4 million in gross proceeds, with funds earmarked for working capital, general corporate purposes and debt repayment, while insider participation and related-party considerations were structured to remain within Canadian minority protection thresholds and the financing remains subject to final TSX Venture Exchange approval.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:GIII) stock is a Hold with a C$0.22 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ReGen III Corp stock, see the TSE:GIII Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GIII Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GIII is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses and cash burn, and negative equity indicating elevated liquidity/balance-sheet risk). Technicals are a meaningful offset with bullish price positioning above moving averages and positive MACD, while valuation remains unattractive/unclear due to losses (negative P/E) and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on GIII stock, click here.

More about ReGen III Corp

ReGen III Corp. is a clean technology company that uses its patented ReGen process to upcycle used motor oil into premium Group II and III base oils. These sustainable base oils serve high-performance engines, turbines, industrial applications and emerging uses such as data center dielectric fluids, with a circular model designed to significantly cut lifecycle CO₂e emissions.

Average Trading Volume: 86,450

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$23.54M

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

Flux Power Holdings ( (FLUX) ) has issued an update.

Flux Power Holdings, Inc. held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders on March 26, 2026, with 14,117,593 of 21,340,135 eligible common shares represented in person or by proxy, constituting a quorum. Shareholders elected directors Krishna Vanka, Dale T. Robinette, Michael Johnson, Lisa Walters-Hoffert, and Mark F. Leposky to serve until the 2027 annual meeting or until successors are chosen, reinforcing continuity in the company’s leadership and governance.

Investors also ratified the appointment of Haskell & White LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2026, with an overwhelming majority of votes cast in favor. The strong support for both the board slate and the auditor suggests shareholder confidence in Flux Power’s current strategic direction and financial oversight as it advances its operations in the energy storage market.

The most recent analyst rating on (FLUX) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Flux Power Holdings stock, see the FLUX Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FLUX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (ongoing losses and renewed TTM cash burn) and bearish technicals (price below major moving averages with negative MACD). The earnings call adds some support due to a first profitable quarter and improving margins/expenses, but near-term guidance risk from a major customer capital freeze and low cash materially caps the overall rating.

data.title: RDE Receives Nasdaq Notice Over Minimum Bid Price
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

RDE ( (GIFT) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 24, 2026, Giftify disclosed that it had received a notice from Nasdaq indicating that its common stock had closed below the required $1 minimum bid price for 30 consecutive business days, triggering a deficiency under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). Nasdaq granted the company 180 calendar days to regain compliance by maintaining a closing bid price of at least $1 for a minimum of ten consecutive business days, with the possibility of an additional 180-day extension if other listing standards are met.

Nasdaq also advised that if Giftify does not restore compliance within the allotted periods, and cannot demonstrate an actionable plan to cure the deficiency, including potentially through a reverse stock split, its shares could ultimately be subject to delisting from the exchange. The notice underscores pressure on the company’s share performance and highlights the risk that investors could face reduced liquidity and visibility if the stock were removed from the Nasdaq market.

The most recent analyst rating on (GIFT) stock is a Hold with a $0.89 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on RDE stock, see the GIFT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GIFT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GIFT is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance—persistent losses, negative operating/free cash flow, and volatile revenue—despite some improvement in 2025 and a cleaner recent balance sheet. Technicals add modest pressure with the price below key longer-term moving averages and a negative MACD, while valuation remains constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on GIFT stock, click here.

More about RDE

Giftify, also referred to as the Company, is listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market and has its common stock traded under Nasdaq’s listing framework. The firm is subject to Nasdaq’s continued listing standards, including minimum bid price and market value requirements applicable to smaller-cap issuers on this market tier.

Average Trading Volume: 71,411

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $29.94M

Learn more about GIFT stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: i-80 Gold Secures Major Gold Prepay Financing Facility
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from i-80 Gold Corp ( (TSE:IAU) ) is now available.

On March 24, 2026, i-80 Gold Corp. announced it had closed a gold prepayment facility of up to $250 million with National Bank of Canada and Macquarie Bank, securing an immediate $150 million and an additional $100 million accordion option. The facility obligates the company to deliver 39,978 ounces of gold over 30 months starting January 2028 and forms the final piece of a broader recapitalization program.

Through multiple financings since early 2025, including royalty, equity, convertible notes and the new prepay facility, i-80 Gold has raised more than $1 billion to fund its multi-phase Nevada development plan. This capital is expected to cover Phase 1 and 2 work on three underground mines, an open-pit project and refurbishment of the Lone Tree processing plant, significantly reducing financing risk and positioning the company to grow production and potentially generate enough cash flow to support a subsequent Phase 3 expansion.

i-80 Gold says the recapitalization was completed ahead of its mid-2026 target and gives it flexibility to accelerate infill drilling, engineering and technical studies at the Mineral Point project. The strengthened balance sheet and clearer funding path enhance the company’s ability to execute its regional hub-and-spoke strategy in Nevada, potentially improving its long-term competitive standing among mid-tier gold producers and offering greater visibility for stakeholders around project advancement and future output.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:IAU) stock is a Sell with a C$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on i-80 Gold Corp stock, see the TSE:IAU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IAU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IAU is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large losses and persistent cash burn) and bearish technical trends (price below key moving averages with negative MACD). The latest earnings call is a relative positive due to major financing and clearer long-term production scaling plans, but near-term cost, timing, and high-capex execution risks remain significant. Valuation adds limited support given negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on IAU stock, click here.

More about i-80 Gold Corp

i-80 Gold Corp. is a Nevada-focused mining company aiming to build a mid-tier gold producer through a development plan advancing high-quality gold assets across the state. Listed on the TSX and NYSE American, it holds one of Nevada’s largest gold resource bases and is pursuing a hub-and-spoke strategy centered on refurbishing its Lone Tree processing facility to support multiple underground and open-pit projects.

i-80 Gold’s portfolio includes high-grade, multi-stage projects such as Granite Creek, Archimedes, Cove, and Mineral Point, located along Nevada’s most prolific gold trends. By integrating these mines with a centralized autoclave and processing hub at Lone Tree, the company seeks to enhance operating efficiency, scale production, and accelerate growth within the U.S. gold mining sector.

Average Trading Volume: 1,918,131

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$1.55B

See more insights into IAU stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Forum Markets Expands Manufactured Housing Loan Portfolio Framework
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Forum Markets ( (FRMM) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 23, 2026, Forum Markets, via its wholly owned ETHZilla Modular Mortgage unit, entered into a five‑year master loan purchase and servicing framework with Zippy Loans to build a revolving portfolio of manufactured home chattel loans of up to $150 million, subject to defined eligibility, representations and repurchase protections. Concurrently, it executed an initial purchase commitment through June 30, 2026, and acquired 31 manufactured home chattel loans for about $1.44 million funded with cash on hand, while appointing Zippy Loans as servicer under customary performance and default terms, with the company classifying the Initial Loans as an asset acquisition rather than a business for reporting purposes.

The arrangements deepen Forum Markets’ role in manufactured housing finance, leveraging its equity stake in Zippy’s parent to align interests in loan origination and servicing while establishing a scalable platform for ongoing loan purchases within defined credit and geographic parameters. The structure provides Forum Markets with a path to expand loan assets over time, while retaining flexibility to replace Zippy as servicer upon default events and potentially enhancing returns through disciplined underwriting criteria and servicing oversight.

The most recent analyst rating on (FRMM) stock is a Hold with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Forum Markets stock, see the FRMM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FRMM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FRMM is a Neutral.

Overall score is pressured most by very weak financial performance (large losses and ongoing cash burn) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Corporate actions are a relative positive—especially the convertible note redemption and strategic moves—but they do not yet offset the current profitability, cash-flow, and trend concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on FRMM stock, click here.

More about Forum Markets

Forum Markets, Incorporated operates in financial services through subsidiaries such as ETHZilla Modular Mortgage LLC, focusing on acquiring and holding manufactured home chattel loan receivables. The company also has strategic exposure to the manufactured housing finance ecosystem, holding approximately 15% of the fully diluted equity of Zippy, Inc., parent of loan originator and servicer Zippy Loans, LLC.

data.title: Calidi Biotherapeutics Reports 2025 Results, Advances Oncology Pipeline
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Calidi Biotherapeutics ( (CLDI) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 27, 2026, Calidi Biotherapeutics reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, highlighting scientific and clinical progress alongside continued losses as it advances its oncology pipeline. The company formed a partnership with Avance Clinical in Australia to rapidly initiate a first-in-human trial of its lead oncolytic virus CLD-401 and reported supportive FDA Type D feedback as it works toward an IND filing by the end of 2026.

Calidi also entered a GMP manufacturing agreement with Matica Bio for CLD-401, presented new data on in situ T-cell engagers from its RedTail platform at the 2026 AACR-IO conference, and raised $6.5 million through an underwritten offering and ATM sales to extend its cash runway. For 2025, Calidi posted a net loss attributable to common stockholders of $25.6 million, modestly higher than 2024, with increased R&D spending, lower general and administrative costs, and cash declining to $5.6 million at year-end, underscoring its dependence on additional financing as it moves toward clinical trials.

The most recent analyst rating on (CLDI) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Calidi Biotherapeutics stock, see the CLDI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CLDI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CLDI is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by persistent losses and significant cash burn with no revenue base, despite improved leverage and positive equity. Technicals also remain broadly bearish (below key moving averages and negative MACD), while corporate events provide a modest offset through financing and encouraging preclinical progress. Valuation contributes little given the negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on CLDI stock, click here.

More about Calidi Biotherapeutics

Calidi Biotherapeutics Inc. is a San Diego-based biotechnology company focused on developing targeted genetic medicines for cancer using its proprietary RedTail platform, an engineered enveloped oncolytic virus designed for systemic delivery to metastatic tumor sites. Lead candidate CLD-401, now in IND-enabling studies, targets non-small cell lung cancer, head and neck cancer and other high-need tumors, and the company is also advancing in situ T-cell engager approaches for solid tumors.

The RedTail technology is intended to shield therapeutic viruses from immune clearance, enabling them to reach tumors, induce tumor lysis and deliver genetic payloads directly within the tumor microenvironment. Calidi, listed on the NYSE American under ticker CLDI, is positioning this platform to address solid tumors where conventional therapies and existing T-cell engager strategies have shown limitations.

Average Trading Volume: 216,120

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.07M

See more data about CLDI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from TF Bank AB ( (SE:TFBANK) ) is now available.

TF Bank’s UK subsidiary, TFBN Services Ltd, has received authorisation from the UK Financial Conduct Authority to conduct consumer credit activities and offer payment services in the country. The approval strengthens TF Bank’s regulatory footing in a key European market, enabling expansion of its product offering in the UK and potentially reinforcing its competitive position in cross-border consumer finance and payments.

The move aligns with the group’s strategy of scalable, technology-driven growth, leveraging its proprietary IT platform to roll out services efficiently across multiple jurisdictions. FCA authorisation may also enhance trust among UK consumers and partners, supporting further growth in transaction volumes and helping diversify TF Bank’s geographic revenue base within Europe.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:TFBANK) stock is a Buy with a SEK185.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on TF Bank AB stock, see the SE:TFBANK Stock Forecast page.

More about TF Bank AB

TF Bank AB is a fast-growing provider of credit and payment services operating across 14 European countries, including the United Kingdom. The group develops simple, flexible payment and financing solutions for millions of customers using proprietary IT infrastructure, and has focused on scalable, automated growth since its 2016 listing on Nasdaq Stockholm.

data.title: Rapid Micro Biosystems Announces COO Transition and Consulting Role
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Rapid Micro Biosystems ( (RPID) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 23, 2026, Rapid Micro Biosystems announced that Chief Operating Officer John Wilson intends to depart the company effective April 10, 2026, citing a desire to spend more time with his family and with no disagreements regarding company operations or policies. In conjunction with his departure, President and Chief Executive Officer Robert Spignesi will assume the additional duties of principal operating officer as of April 10, 2026, with no new material compensation arrangements disclosed.

On March 26, 2026, the company entered into a Consulting Services and Separation Agreement with Wilson that grants him agreed separation benefits under his existing employment contract, engages him as an hourly consultant through no later than June 30, 2026, and extends the period to exercise his vested stock options through March 31, 2027. The agreement also imposes volume limits on the weekly disposition of the company’s Class A common stock underlying his vested options during that period and includes customary provisions on confidentiality, cooperation, non‑disparagement, and return of company property, aiming to ensure an orderly leadership transition and continued access to Wilson’s expertise.

The most recent analyst rating on (RPID) stock is a Hold with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rapid Micro Biosystems stock, see the RPID Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RPID Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RPID is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by continued large losses, persistent cash burn, and reduced balance-sheet cushion despite improving gross margin and revenue growth. Technicals also remain weak with the stock below key moving averages. Offsetting these are constructive 2026 growth and margin-improvement guidance and strong commercial momentum from recent multi-system orders.

To see Spark’s full report on RPID stock, click here.

More about Rapid Micro Biosystems

Rapid Micro Biosystems, Inc. operates in the life sciences and biopharmaceutical quality control sector, providing automated microbial detection and contamination testing technologies used in regulated manufacturing environments. Its products and services focus on accelerating and automating quality assurance processes for pharmaceutical and other highly regulated industries that require reliable microbiological testing.

Average Trading Volume: 276,504

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $103.7M
